values.content: You are a senior fraud analyst at Barclays Bank. Write concise, professional incident summaries in exactly 2-3 sentences. Always state: what was detected, why it is dangerous, and what immediate action the security team must take. Be specific about the risk score and tier.
You are a fraud analyst at Barclays Bank. Write brief, professional incident summaries in 2 sentences. State what was detected and what the analyst should do.

parameters.jsCode:
// Build full HTML approval email for CRITICAL — human must click to approve or reject const d = $input.first().json; const baseUrl = 'http://localhost:5678/webhook/fraudshield-approval'; const approveUrl = `${baseUrl}?incident_id=${d.incident_id}&approved=true&prediction_id=${d.prediction_id}`; const rejectUrl = `${baseUrl}?incident_id=${d.incident_id}&approved=false&prediction_id=${d.prediction_id}`; const indicatorsList = (d.top_indicators || []).map(i => `
  • ${i}
    • `).join(''); const headersList = (d.header_flags || []).map(i => `
  • ${i}
    • `).join(''); const html = `
    FraudShield AI — Barclays Incident Response

    CRITICAL Fraud Alert

    Incident ${d.incident_id}  |  ${d.logged_at}
    ${d.risk_score}
    out of 100 — ${d.tier}
    Recommended action: ${d.outlook_action}
    Verdict${d.verdict}
    AI Generated${Math.round(d.ai_generated_prob * 100)}% probability
    RoBERTa Confidence${Math.round(d.roberta_prob * 100)}%
    Injection Score${d.injection_score}/100
    Source${d.source}
    AI ANALYST SUMMARY (Llama3)
    ${d.llm_summary}
    ${indicatorsList ? `
    TOP INDICATORS
      ${indicatorsList}
    ` : ''} ${headersList ? `
    HEADER FLAGS
      ${headersList}
    ` : ''} ${d.email_preview ? `
    Email preview:
    ${d.email_preview}
    ` : ''}
    Human approval required — choose an action:
    QUARANTINE EMAIL MARK AS SAFE
    Your decision will be permanently logged and used to retrain the FraudShield model.
    `; return [{ json: { ...d, approval_email_html: html, approve_url: approveUrl, reject_url: rejectUrl } }];

parameters.subject: =[CRITICAL] FraudShield Alert — {{ $json.incident_id }} — Score {{ $json.risk_score }}/100 — Human Approval Required

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'received', incident_id: $('Enrich + Classify Tier').first().json.incident_id, tier: $('Enrich + Classify Tier').first().json.tier, risk_score: $('Enrich + Classify Tier').first().json.risk_score, workflow: 'activated' }) }}
